title: IPTM (Improved Tool Models)
description: it *improves* the tool model view in first person perspective as well as in third person perspective
body:
Hello people,\
First of all thank you for being here :)\
If you want to minimally improve your Minecraft experience this is the right place for you.\
It significantly improves the view of the tools in first as well as in third person.\
In my opinion it looks much better.\
The texture pack only changes the model.txt which means it is compatible with any texture pack.\
With some texturepacks you have to give the IPTM texturepack higher priority.
